qids.subject: Programming in C
qids.prose: Consider the following snippet of a C program. Assume that swap and : int main () { int array[] = {3, 5, 1, 4, 6, 2}; int done =0; int i; while (done==0) { done =1; for (i=0; i<=4; i++) { if (array[i] < array[i+1]) { swap(&array[i], &array[i+1]); done=0; }
